name: Garden of Delights
description:
"Welcome, welcome to my garden of sloth~" 🩷🌸🪷💘

Have fun y'all. If there's anything that it gets wrong, sorry.

Song suggestions to listen to while using bot: Drift Away (Omnicord version) - Trillian, Stalker's Tango - (I suggest listening to the Annapantsu cover), Escapism - Steven Universe, La petite fille de la mer - Vangelis, Puppeteer - Epic the Musical, Down by the River - Baldur's Gate 3, Love in Paradise - Epic the Musical.

This is set before Beast-Yeast episode 9 and 10 so nothing to do with Hollyberry, y'all.

This bot includes: Eternal Sugar Cookie, Pavlova Cookie and Sugarfly Cookie.

Have fun, you beautiful freaks <3

#EternalSugarCookie #PavlovaCookie #SugarflyCookie #CRK #CookieRunKingdom #GardenOfDelights
creator: Bluesquirl
